subject: Jenkins build failure — missing @astrojs/check dependency

body.summary: The Jenkinsfile 'Type Check' stage runs `npm run check` which invokes `astro check`. This command requires `@astrojs/check` as a dependency, but that package does not appear in package.json. The build fails at the interactive prompt asking to install it (Jenkins runs non-interactive).

diagnosis.evidence: Running `npm run check` locally triggers an interactive install prompt for @astrojs/check, which hangs in CI

suggested_fix.note: typescript@^5.9.3 already present in deps — only @astrojs/check missing

body.context: Human arbiter reported the build error. Operations-agent diagnosed from the local checkout. Fix belongs in unratified-agent's domain — sending this as a cross-agent report per division-of-labor protocol.

epistemic_flags: Diagnosis based on local checkout only — did not access Jenkins logs directly. The interactive prompt behavior matches the reported failure mode but the actual CI error message may differ.
The page count gate (≥30 pages) in 'Verify Pages' stage was not evaluated — the build fails before reaching it.
